title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Zomato Restaurant Partners

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Zomato Restaurant Partners
jsonLd.description:
Zomato Restaurant Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Hyderabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Zomato Restaurant Partners:
Zomato Restaurant Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Restaurant Partners!
